feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error when replicate Business Partner from S/4HANA Cloud Public to SAP Cloud for Customer (CPI)
entry.content:
Hello there,

I´m try to integrate SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public to SAP Cloud for Customer with SAP Integration Suite, but, when I´m try to replicate BP to C4C using the communication arrangement SAP_COM_0008, SAP C4C return the next error for integration:

No supported role for business partner 1xxxxxxx

Someone have any idea, how I can solve this issue?

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Document Type defaulted on FI invoice
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We are creating supplier invoices via API Journal Entry - Post. 

In our payload, <AccountingDocumentTpe> is empty. 

But in SAP the journal entry is still posted, with document type 'AB'. 

There is no validation/substitution logic, or BADi, that could explain this behavior. 

I also do not see anything related in the custo. 

Is there a document type used by default in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?

Thank you and regards,

Anaïs

entry.title: How to create Text ID for Purchase Order in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

Need to add text field in above section

entry.title: Is FSCM available in SAP Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

Is FSCM available in SAP Public cloud? if yes, what is the scope item.

On checking the "Digital discovery" could not find any. I am not looking for BD6 or 1QM.

Best Regards,

Dave

entry.title: Basic Credit Management (BD6): Exlcude a payment term (prepayments) from credit limit calculation
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Using Basic Credit Management (BD6) for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408. I would like to know if it is possible to exclude a specific payment term from the credit limit calculation.

Specifically, we want to exclude a specific payment term for payments made in advance (prepayments).
Our goal is that a sales order created with this payment term will never be cheked against a customer's credit limit.

Thank you for your help.

Best regards,
Simon

entry.title: Error accessing CDS View
entry.content:
An error when accessing the following CDS View to get the due date.

 

  • I_FinTransCondition
  • I_FinTransCndnSingleDate

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to set a Pricing Condition type to inactive during Sales order creation/Change
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are trying to set a custom condition type to Inactive/active status in Pricing during Sales order creation / change based on few condition checks in BADI's : PRCG_DOCUMENT_ITEM_REQUIREMENT and PRICING_DOCUMENT_REQUIREMENT.

could you please suggest if its feasible using the Above BADI's or if there is any alternative solution.

Thank you In Advance.

entry.title: What BADIs are available for Service Contracts?
entry.content:
There is a requirement to know what BADIs are available for Service Contracts


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: SAP EPPM public cloud
entry.content: 1- SAP EPPM public cloud Field requirement and the Notification possibilities

entry.title: Synchronization of GL accounts to CIM seems incomplete
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

After setting up the master data synchronization between SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management  we see that the GL-accounts are not synced completely. That means that the number of GL-accounts in S/4 Cloud (company code view) had more accounts then are ever synced to CIM. The number of missing accounts is different on every environment and we also don't see any logic in which accounts are synced and which aren't

As far as I know, from documentation there should be no filtering on the accounts, which in my opinion should result in all accounts from S/4 cloud to be available in CIM. We see this behavior on customer systems but also on our TDD environment. 

Does anyone have this similar problem and do you have pointers to solve this problem?

best regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: How to get the API Key for S4 HANA Cloud trial (Not for the public sandbox).
entry.content:
Hey all, I've been struggling to find how to get the API key for my trial of S4 HANA Cloud.

I've only found how to retrieve the API Key that let's you hit this url: https://sandbox.api.sap.com
But where do I get the key for my S4 HANA Cloud trial instance that has a url of this style: https://myXXXXX.s4hana.ondemand.com/ ?

I'd appreciate a lot some help, also if you can mention how I'd get the API Key for a production environment as well, would be helpful in advance. Cheers.

entry.title: How to auto trigger price update when important data is changed in sales order?
entry.content:
Hello,

prices (e.g. PPR0) depends on several fields, which can be changed later. For example, Plant.

When user changes the Plant (or other data), we need to automatically trigger full prices update, otherwise all pricing conditions stay unchanged and user must always trigger price update which may lead to errors.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Italy eInvoice submission to SDI
entry.content:
Consider the below scenario-

The invoice is created and sent to the SDI. If the SDI rejects the XML due to error such as: Wrong SDI code or wrong VAT number, is it possible to regenerate the XML without having to cancel the invoice? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: General ledger distribution and assessment
entry.content:
Hi,

As I have different allocation portions between Local and group GAAP, I need to make distribution and assessment to general ledger level. I found a solution with transactions FAGLGA11 & FAGLGA31 but I read that those transactions are going to be deprecated in the SAP S/4HANA latest versions. Does anyone know how can I do it with new transactions? I have tried with KSV1 & KSU1 but I can not choose the ledger so they are not useful for me. 

Regards,
Ale.

entry.title: Payment run; clearing journal entry
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are working with the latest SAP Public Cloud 2408 release and facing the following problem:

We run the app "Manage automatic payments" for our weekly supplier payments. There are more than 1000 invoices in this payment run which have been cleared. Before sending the file to the bank, we noticed a mistake.

At that point, it is not possible to reverse the payment run because the payment media has been created - even if I delete the payment media. The only solution in SAP Public Cloud is the manual reverse (see Note 2682947).

For each supplier there's a single clearing journal entry. As per now, I have to reverse approx. 200 clearing journal entries manually.

e.g. Supplier A = clearing journal entry 20000000100, Supplier B = clearing journal entry 2000000101, Supplier C = clearing journal entry 2000000102

 

My question: Is there a configuration in the system to generate a clearing journal entry for each payment run?

e.g. Supplier A = clearing journal entry 20000000100, Supplier B = clearing journal entry 2000000100, Supplier C = clearing journal entry 2000000100

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: Inquiry About Time Tracking for Inspections in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently exploring options for tracking time spent on inspections within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, specifically related to Quality Management (QM) processes. My goal is to understand the capabilities of the system in terms of collecting and recording labor time for various inspection activities, such as incoming inspections and final control after goods receipt.

Could you please clarify the following:

  • Is there a standard way to capture time for inspections in the S/4HANA Public Cloud?
  • For example, is there a built-in app or functionality for recording time spent on quality inspections directly within the system?

     

  • Can time tracking for inspections be linked to QM processes or be part of the inspection lot in some way?
  • Are there any recommended best practices or configurations for implementing time tracking for inspections in the cloud environment?

If anyone has experience with similar functionalities or can provide insights into how to configure or use time tracking features, I would greatly appreciate your input.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,

Atanas

entry.title: Message no. M7242 - Valuation control in material master and special stock differs
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

An issue arises in the 'Enter Inspection Results from Warehouse' app in Public Cloud (BEST PRACTICE - BKP - Customer returns).

After processing a return delivery, I selected the 'replacement order' (free-of-charge delivery is created with reference to replacement order) option as a follow-up action. This triggers an automatic requirement for a free-of-charge delivery. However, when I proceed with production and attempt to do the final confirmation and receive the goods, the following error appears and prevents the goods receipt against the production order.

Valuation control in material master and special stock differs

 

Message no. M7242

 

Diagnosis

 

You want to post a material document in which the special stock
indicator is different from the entries in the material master record.
This can lead to data inconsistencies, so the system does not permit
this posting.

Could you please provide a solution or guidance on how to resolve these issues? Thank you very much!

Best regards,
Kaushika

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Leading zeros in product master
entry.content:
At my current customer we need to create productnumbers with one or multiple leading zeroes. Productnumbers doesn't have the same length and we have used the tickbox in the material type to ignore the external number range, but this is not working for productnumbers only consisting of numbers.

Productnumbers are not only consisting of numbers, but could also contain letters.

Is there any way to create the external productnumbers as desired?

entry.title: Change document types in Free Form Payment
entry.content:
Dear SAP Public Cloud Community,

I'd like to know if there is a chance to change document type for the accounting document triggered from the Free Form Payment procedure (Scope Item J60). This because after the process of free form payment, there will be generated two documents: one is belonging to F110 (triggered in automatic after this procedure) where I have Technical account @ Bank Transitory and another for cleared the previous document, in which I have Accounts Payable @ Technical account. Both this document will be created with document type "ZP" (used for automatic payment), so the requirement is to change the document type for accounting document that post Accounts Payable @ Technical account (so not triggered by F110 transaction/Manage automatic payment app).

Best Regards

entry.title: "Manage Workforce" history is not displayed
entry.content:
In Manage Workforce app, for any given employee recently created, there seems to be an issue within "Show Change Log" option.

At first, there are a couple of existing lines when the area is reached. However, the only fields with value are "Changed by" and "Changed on". Fields such as "Field Name", "Old Value" and "New Value" appear empty.

Can this behavior be explained?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
